blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,980 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
